title: Geekbench 7 will push your computer or phone even harder for better benchmarking
summary: It looks and acts like Geekbench 6, but under the hood are larger datasets, new audio / video tests, and more tweaks. Scores from Geekbench 6 are of course not compatible with Geekbench 7.
caption: output/2026-07-23/geekbench-7-will-push-your-computer-or-phone-even-harder-for-better-be.txt
